LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF JANE DOE'S MOTION TO LIFT STAY OF CIVIL CASE. ON MAY 2, 2022, THIS COURT STAYED THE PROCEEDINGS IN THIS CASE UNTIL FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT. THE STAY WAS APPARENTLY IN VIEW OF CRIMINAL PROCEEDINGS INVOLVING THE DEFENDANT. THE CHARGES HAVE PROCEEDED TO JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF NOW SEEKS TO LIFT THE STAY, AND THE MOTION IS UNOPPOSED. THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTION AND LIFTS THE STAY OF PROCEEDINGS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/CVA)

ANTHONY L. LABEL,Esq., THE VEEN FIRM LLP (415) 673-4800 AL.Team@VeenFirm.com ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF JANE DOE
ELIZABETH BERTOLINO, ESQ., BERTILINO LAW FIRM, 415-542-6409 elizabeth@bertolinolawfirm.com ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF JANE DOE
JOSEPH SALAMA, LAW OFFICES OF JOSEPH SALAMA (415) 948-9030 Attorneys for Defendant JOSEPH GARCIA

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JANE DOE'S Motion To Lift Stay Of Civil Case

On May 2, 2022, this court stayed the proceedings in this case until further order of the court. The stay was apparently in view of criminal proceedings involving the defendant. The charges have proceeded to judgment. Plaintiff now seeks to lift the stay, and the motion is unopposed. The court grants the motion and lifts the stay of proceedings.

Order signed.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
